name: io.github.dusk-network/pituitary
description: Intent governance for AI-native teams. Detect spec overlap, stale docs, code contradictions, terminology drift, and change impact. 13 tools. No API keys required.

tools.name: search_specs
tools.description: Semantic search across indexed spec sections. Filter by domain and status.

tools.name: check_overlap
tools.description: Detect specs that cover overlapping ground. Returns similarity scores and relationship classification.

tools.name: compare_specs
tools.description: Side-by-side tradeoff analysis of two specs.

tools.name: analyze_impact
tools.description: Trace which specs, code refs, and docs are affected when a spec changes.

tools.name: check_doc_drift
tools.description: Find docs that have gone stale relative to accepted specs, with cited evidence.

tools.name: review_spec
tools.description: Full composite review: overlap + comparison + impact + drift + remediation.

tools.name: check_compliance
tools.description: Check a PR diff against accepted specs for contradictions.

tools.name: check_terminology
tools.description: Audit terminology against declared policies. Separates actionable violations from tolerated historical uses.

tools.name: governed_by
tools.description: Look up which specs govern a given file or path.

tools.name: compile_preview
tools.description: Preview context-aware terminology patches before applying.

tools.name: fix_preview
tools.description: Preview deterministic auto-fix edits before applying.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Index health at a glance: artifact counts, runtime profile, staleness.

tools.name: explain_file
tools.description: Explain a file's role in the spec/doc corpus and its governance relationships.
